details.test: Task 1: Cheapest standard with termite under $500 (Friday morning)
Task 2: Mid-tier condo quote between $250 and $350
Task 3: Package with radon + mold under $600, morning slot within 14 days
Task 4: Multi-unit evening slot 10001 with same-day report and travel fee <= $75
Task 5: Purchase $300 digital gift certificate via email
Task 6: Weekend bundle with SAVE50, final total under $500
Task 7: Save & copy link for first-time homebuyer checklist article
Task 8: Nearest covered city for uncovered address and contact request
Task 9: Custom inspection with exactly 3 add-ons under $200
